metadata.description: Enterprise greenfield workflow: research, architect, and scaffold a production-grade starting point using 9 specialist planning agents.

plugins.name: greenfield
plugins.description: 9-agent planning plugin. Interviews you, runs parallel specialist research, reconciles into ADRs/C4/threat model, and scaffolds a compliance-ready reference app with IaC, CI/CD, observability, and design system baked in. Hand off to feature-level workflow once first commit exists.
